title: potentilla mogollonica
intro: Potentilla mogollonica, also known as the Mogollon potentilla, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Potentilla mogollonica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Potentilla mogollonica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
